business_justification.json.business_need: USBAY requires a governed GitHub connector pilot to validate repository-scoped automation authority under Policy Brain, human approval, and audit controls before any production connector activation.
business_justification.json.governance_objective: Prove that GitHub connector onboarding can proceed through explicit authority, approval, permission, rollback, and audit evidence without granting production mutation authority.
business_justification.json.expected_connector_capability: Create a review-only governance issue in the pilot repository after separate approval and pre-action audit evidence.

alternatives_considered.reason: PB-042 rejected Fine-Grained PAT as the primary production model because it is user-token-based and weaker for long-term governed automation.
Manual operation cannot validate the USBAY connector governance path from Policy Brain through audit receipt capture.

risk_assessment.json.risk_summary: GitHub App creation may establish future automation authority over repository resources. Risk is controlled by repository scope, minimal permissions, required approvals, audit evidence, rollback, and no production activation.
mutation_risks: Unauthorized ruleset or branch protection changes
scope_risks: Repository scope expands beyond pilot repository
Permission scope exceeds first pilot capability
Production activation inferred from app creation
mitigations: Issues write permission only for first pilot capability
Explicit denial of branch deletion, merges, releases, rulesets, branch protection, and secret management
Two required approvals before app creation
Separate approval before any live action
Pre-action audit before any connector call
Post-action receipt capture after any connector response
residual_risks: GitHub App has not been created or inspected
No live credential validity evidence exists
No live permission validation evidence exists
No live GitHub receipt capture evidence exists

repository_scope.json.scope_expiration: 14 days after required approval or immediately on scope, permission, policy, or credential change

denied_repositories: all repositories not explicitly listed in allowed_repositories
installation_scope.json.scope_change_process: Any installation scope expansion requires updated repository_scope.json, permission_manifest.json, risk_assessment.json, USBAY-AUDIT approval, USBAY-GLOBAL23 approval, and a new audit record.

credential_revocation_steps: Revoke or rotate GitHub App private key
Verify no active token remains trusted
installation_removal_steps: Remove app installation from pilot repository when required
Verify connector remains blocked after removal
recovery_validation_steps: Verify connector actions fail closed after rollback
Verify no repository mutation authority remains active
Require new approvals before resuming onboarding

audit_authority_record.json.audit_scope: Review and accept or reject all GitHub App onboarding evidence before creation. Preserve evidence chronology and block creation if required evidence is missing.
evidence_acceptance_criteria: All required approval references are present
Permission scope is limited to pilot capability
Repository scope is limited to pilot repository
export_requirements: Package evidence must be exportable as JSON and Markdown
Package evidence must include generated commit title, PR title, and PR body
Package evidence must include approval status and remaining evidence gaps
retention_requirements: Do not rewrite package chronology after review
Future approval records must append new evidence rather than overwrite this package

credential_authority_record.json.credential_owner: USJAY77 until service-account custody evidence exists
credential_authority_record.json.generation_authority: USJAY77 may generate GitHub App credentials only after USBAY-AUDIT and USBAY-GLOBAL23 approve app creation.
credential_authority_record.json.storage_authority: Approved external secret manager or protected deployment secret store; repository storage is forbidden.
credential_authority_record.json.rotation_authority: USJAY77 under USBAY-AUDIT review; emergency rotation may be initiated by USJAY77 to prevent harm.
credential_authority_record.json.secret_reference_policy: Repository evidence may store only secret reference hashes, credential authority records, rotation evidence hashes, and revocation evidence hashes. Raw private keys, tokens, and webhook secrets are forbidden.
incident_response_path: Revoke affected private key or webhook secret
Verify no active token remains trusted

acceptance_answers.is_the_onboarding_package_fully_populate: Yes. All eight PB-046 onboarding artifacts are populated with concrete review values.
acceptance_answers.are_all_required_onboarding_artifacts_pr: Yes. business_justification, risk_assessment, permission_manifest, repository_scope, installation_scope, rollback_plan, audit_authority_record, and credential_authority_record are present.
acceptance_answers.can_the_package_be_submitted_for_governa: Yes. The package is review-ready but does not authorize GitHub App creation until required approvals are recorded.

generated_pr_metadata.commit_title: PB-047 VERIFIED: GitHub Pilot Onboarding Evidence Package
generated_pr_metadata.pr_title: PB-047 VERIFIED: GitHub Pilot Onboarding Evidence Package
